file.description: This file contains the readme information for the block.
file.content:
=== Telex Pricing Table Block ===
Contributors: WordPress Telex Tags: block, pricing, table, plans, comparison Tested up to: 6.8 Stable tag: 0.1.0 License: GPLv2 or later License URI: https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-2.0.html A beautiful, fully customizable pricing table block for the WordPress block editor. Display your pricing plans side by side with features, buttons, and highlighted recommended plans.
== Description ==
Telex Pricing Table Block is a feature-rich pricing table block for the WordPress Gutenberg editor. Inspired by popular pricing table plugins, it allows you to create stunning pricing comparison tables directly within the block editor.
**Key Features:**
* **Multiple Pricing Plans** — Add up to 6 pricing plans displayed side by side in a responsive grid. * **Customizable Plan Details** — Set plan name, price, currency symbol, billing period, and description for each plan. * **Feature Lists** — Add unlimited features per plan with optional checkmark or cross icons to indicate included/excluded features. * **Call-to-Action Buttons** — Customize button text and URL for each plan with option to open links in a new tab. * **Featured/Recommended Plan** — Highlight a plan as "recommended" with a badge and visual emphasis. * **Color Customization** — Choose header background color, header text color, button color, button text color, and featured plan accent color. * **Layout Options** — Choose between 1 to 4 columns layout. * **Border Radius** — Control the roundness of the pricing cards. * **Hover Effects** — Smooth hover animations for an engaging user experience. * **Responsive Design** — Plans stack gracefully on smaller screens. * **Live Preview** — See all changes in real time within the editor.
== Installation ==
1. Upload the plugin files to the `/wp-content/plugins/telex-pricing-table` directory, or install the plugin through the WordPress plugins screen directly. 2. Activate the plugin through the 'Plugins' screen in WordPress. 3. In the block editor, search for "Pricing Table" and add the block to your page.
== Frequently Asked Questions ==
= How many plans can I add? =
You can add up to 6 pricing plans in a single block.
= Can I highlight a recommended plan? =
Yes! Each plan has a "Featured" toggle that adds a visual badge and elevated styling.
= Is the block responsive? =
Yes, the pricing table is fully responsive and adapts to all screen sizes.
== Screenshots ==
1. Pricing table with three plans in the editor. 2. Frontend display with featured/recommended plan highlighted.
== Changelog ==
= 0.1.0 = * Initial release with full pricing table functionality.

file.description: Main plugin file for the Telex Pricing Table Block.
file.content:
<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name:       Telex Pricing Table Block
 * Description:       A beautiful, fully customizable pricing table block with multiple plans, feature lists, CTA buttons, and featured plan highlighting.
 * Version:           0.1.0
 * Requires at least: 6.4
 * Requires PHP:      7.4
 * Author:            WordPress Telex
 * License:           GPLv2 or later
 * License URI:       https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-2.0.html
 * Text Domain:       telex-pricing-table
 *
 * @package TelexPricingTable
 */

if ( ! defined( 'ABSPATH' ) ) {
	exit; // Exit if accessed directly.
}
/**
 * Registers the block using the metadata loaded from the `block.json` file.
 * Behind the scenes, it registers also all assets so they can be enqueued
 * through the block editor in the corresponding context.
 *
 * @see https://developer.wordpress.org/reference/functions/register_block_type/
 */
if ( ! function_exists( 'telex_pricing_table_telex_pricing_table_block_init' ) ) {
	function telex_pricing_table_telex_pricing_table_block_init() {
		register_block_type( __DIR__ . '/build/' );
	}
}
add_action( 'init', 'telex_pricing_table_telex_pricing_table_block_init' );

file.description: Block metadata for the pricing table block.
Edit component for the pricing table block with full inspector controls.
Save component that renders the static frontend markup.
Shared styles for both the editor and frontend.
Frontend view script for hover animations on pricing cards.
Render callback — not used for this static block.
Package configuration for the block plugin.
